subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One of the world, Who through a hundred thousand means hath manifested His servants and nurtured them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را سزاوار که بصد هزار اسباب عباد خود را ظاهر فرمود و تربیت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement
